productDisplayName: Nautica Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: Black dial with silver hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Two chronograph time displays and date apeture on the 6 hour mark Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
